title: Applicant
description: A person or entity that has applied for a credential through an application-approval flow. Applicants are a first-class entity with a lifecycle that terminates in credential issuance, rejection, or withdrawal.

organization_id.description: Organization that owns this applicant record

flow_id.description: The application_approval_issuance flow that governs this applicant

credential_template_id.description: Credential template to be issued upon approval. Resolved from the flow unless overridden.

user_id.description: Platform user account associated with this applicant, if one exists. May be null for applicants who have not yet created an account.

external_id.description: Caller-supplied external identifier (e.g., HR system ID, case number)

status.description: Applicant lifecycle state. Transitions: DRAFT→SUBMITTED→UNDER_REVIEW→APPROVED→CREDENTIALED or REJECTED. See protocol/applicant/SPECIFICATION.md for full FSM.

reviewer_id.description: User ID of the currently assigned reviewer. Set when a ReviewerLock is acquired.

reviewer_lock_expires_at.description: Expiry time of the current reviewer lock. Null if no lock is held.

rejection_reason.description: Human-readable rejection reason, set when status = REJECTED

application_data.description: Applicant-supplied form data corresponding to the application_template fields. Keys match field names from the ApplicationTemplate.

vetting_checks.description: References to VettingCheck sub-resources. Read-only from the applicant schema perspective.

issued_credential_id.description: ID of the issued credential record when status = CREDENTIALED
